title: sesleria uliginosa f. micrantha
intro: Sesleria uliginosa f. micrantha, also known as small-flowered sesleria, is a subspecies of the Sesleria uliginosa plant, a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Sesleria uliginosa f. micrantha has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
